mechanism: $250-350B of CLO reinvestment periods expiring removes the marginal bid for leveraged loans at the same time maturity wall borrowers need refinancing. Creates a supply-demand headwind independent of credit deterioration that widens spreads through structural demand withdrawal.
regime_dependence: Timing-dependent: the 18-month expiration window coincides with peak maturity wall refinancing. SOFR levels determine whether resets (the historical defusing mechanism) are feasible. CLO arbitrage breaks at SOFR ~4.3-4.5%.
